Title: Verify public task and closest primary sources
Description: Audit the official ORBIT protocol and closest primary baseline sources
Acceptance: Official protocol and baseline sources are recorded with direct links
Notes: Primary sources only for technical claims

Title: Freeze contribution and non-claim boundaries
Description: Separate controller novelty from representation SOTA efficiency and biological claims
Acceptance: Contribution map and non-claim boundary are explicit
Notes: The bounded task claim is distinct from C2 and C3

Title: Implement fail-closed ORBIT manifest and causal episode loader
Description: Implement user-disjoint raw-video episodes with current-and-past-only query access
Acceptance: User split information boundary and loader failure paths have unit tests
Notes: No future frame or query label reaches a deployable method

Title: Test executed-reward cross-user selector
Description: Run the first reward-only selector on held-out validation users
Acceptance: All planned rows and the negative held-out effect are retained
Notes: The result is inconclusive and superseded rather than hidden

Title: Retain failed reward-only evidence as historical
Description: Bind the failed Exp33 raw rows report figure and successor relation
Acceptance: Historical registry resolves Exp33 to Exp34 without deleting evidence

Title: Implement label-free causal consensus and interventions
Description: Implement count belief plus fixed memoryless majority delayed and oracle conditions
Acceptance: No labels future frames autograd or BPTT and full-bank cost is charged
Notes: State resets only at video boundaries in the main method

Title: Run support-annotation-safe validation gate
Description: Use all clean support frames and clutter-only presence filtering in separate caches
Acceptance: The development gate is complete and cannot itself support the claim
Notes: The forbidden-annotation v1 attempt remains invalid

Title: Freeze configuration and run all 17 test users
Description: Execute five seeds and 50 tasks per user with strict expected-set coverage
Acceptance: All 4250 seed-user-task episodes complete after three official video exclusions
Notes: Formal-v2 incomplete coverage remains explicitly invalid

Title: Resolve fixed memoryless majority and delay comparisons
Description: Perform paired user bootstrap and exact sign-flip inference under one Holm family
Acceptance: All four registered comparisons pass direction interval and multiplicity gates
Notes: User is the independent unit and seeds are averaged within user

Title: Render the formal ORBIT evidence panel
Description: Bind user effects causal ablations paired users and full-bank cost in one figure
Visualization: Four-panel publication figure with user dots and non-overlapping labels
Acceptance: PDF and PNG are generated from the formal result tables
Notes: User-equal and official-style metrics are labelled separately

Title: Backfill verified conclusions and invalid coverage history
Description: Write the corrected support result together with SOTA compute and first-look limits
Acceptance: Corrected support and untouched-first-look caveat are both reported
Notes: No invalid result contributes to the supported effect

Title: Add participating E/I carrier after competitive and sparse gates
Description: Realize the surviving motifs without a score-space output bypass
Acceptance: Retain at least 90 percent of gain with closure and normal-contraction gates
Notes: Do not scale neuron count before stronger paired and sparse-compute checks
